title: Teltiar noodle

{{Quote|Put a large pan of ionized water on to boil and cook the noodles as per preference. Most prefer a softened consistency while those with more robust jaws insist on a crunchy texture.|Gormaanda|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Teltiar noodles''' were a type of [[Color/Legends|blue]]-colored noodle that were usually mushy and slightly cooked. They could also be served as a dish alongside [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetables]]; that [[Foodstuff/Legends|dish]] was served [[Temperature/Legends|lukewarm]].<ref name="SWG" />

The noodles were used by the [[Chef/Legends|chef]] [[Gormaanda/Legends|Gormaanda]] in her [[Glowblue Noodles and Chav]] recipe, which instructed cooking the pasta in ionized [[Water/Legends|water]] per the reader's preference; she maintained that most preferred a softened texture, but some with more robust [[Mouth/Legends|jaws]] chose for a more crunchy one. The recipe for teltiar noodles and [[Chav (beverage)|chav]] served as an installment of [[Gormaanda's Culinary Corner]], a column written by the chef and included in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] as well as newsfeeds across the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="HNN" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|life/1344_2.html|Gormaanda's Culinary Corner: Glowblue Noodles & Chav}} is set in 13:4:4 in the [[Great ReSynchronization]] dating system, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Teltiar noodles first appeared in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #50'']], an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]], which was published online<ref name="HNN" /> on [[April 4]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN50 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6308795|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Mavrick889|date=2002-04-04|time=3:16 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> It was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>

They later made an appearance as a craftable item in the [[2003]] [[Sony]] Online Entertainment [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]], [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']],<ref name="SWG" /> which closed in [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> In the game, they are misspelled as "Teltier Noodles," and player characters would receive boosted attributes after eating them.<ref name="SWG" />
